Introduction
    Can a young royal physician change the fate of a cursed princess? When Queen Shim (Jang Hee Jin) is unable to conceive, she visits shaman Hong Joo (Yum Jung Ah). Hong Joo's powerful black magic helps the Queen give birth to a twin...
